page_content:
GEOG718 Seminar in Integrative Studies (3 Credits)

Selected topics integrating various areas of study within the field of geography and/or related disciplines.

Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Geography department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

GEOG732 Spatial Econometrics (3 Credits)

An introduction to modern econometric techniques in general and spatial econometrics in particular, using the popular open source statistical computer language R. A focus on using statistical computing to produce analytical reports for real-world applications, research papers, and dissertations.
